title: Array needs an array index here
body:
Compilation of the following SystemVerilog module throws an error:
```SystemVerilog
module a(output o1 [0:0], input i1 [0:0]);
  assign o1 = i1;
endmodule: a
```

Command:
```
iverilog -g2012 test.sv
```

Error output:
```
error: Array i1 needs an array index here.
error: Unable to elaborate r-value: i1
```

Expected behavior:
This module should be compiled

This issue occurs in `Icarus Verilog version 13.0 (devel) (s20250103-44-gf82c6c7b3)`

Found by a [verilog model](https://github.com/DepTyCheck/verilog-model) using [deptycheck](https://github.com/buzden/deptycheck)
